title: selaginella sellowii
intro: Selaginella sellowii, also known as Resurrection Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella sellowii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Selaginella sellowii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
